webSearch.apiKey.help: Alibaba Bailian / DashScope API key (fallback: DASHSCOPE_API_KEY, MODELSTUDIO_API_KEY, or QWEN_API_KEY).

webSearch.mode.help: Choose AI-synthesized answer mode or structured search results mode.
